title: Event payload — state-change
description: Payload schema for event.payload-subtype = 'state-change' per D10 — workspace state mutation other than composition or lifecycle (e.g., scope set, work-unit transition). Closes D34 finding 5.2. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28.

what.description: Identifier for the state element changed (e.g., 'scope', 'work-unit-status'). Open vocabulary.

before.description: Optional reference to the prior value. Type is permissive — may be a string, structured object, or null (state-element-specific).

after.description: Optional reference to the new value. Type is permissive — may be a string, structured object, or null (state-element-specific).
